name: Turkey Pot Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and mash potatoes, or use leftovers.
2. Stir in egg.
3. Spread mixture into a well-oiled 9-inch pie pan.
4. Bake at 375 degrees for 10 minutes.
5. Combine mayonnaise and lemon juice; stir in turkey, celery, and peas.
6. Spoon filling into potato crust.
7. Top with cheese.
8. Continue baking 15-20 minutes or until hot through.
